page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 2 vCPUs, consisting of 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, and 2.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. The CPU cache configuration includes 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 33 MB L3 cache. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the lower tiers of performance. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance score is 1099.89, while the multi-core score is 1457.99. Memory bandwidth is also limited, with read-only large block transfers at 9.96 GB/sec and write large block transfers at 9.32 GB/sec. Database and web serving capabilities are modest, with Redis SET operations reaching 1.48 million operations per second and static web serving throughput measured at 1.3 GB/sec.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation but low memory capacity of 2.0 GB and lack of local storage, this instance represents a highly constrained hardware profile. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for lightweight, non-memory-intensive tasks that require dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of shared-core scheduling. Appropriate workloads include basic utility hosting, lightweight static web serving, simple task queuing, and minor background processing jobs that do not demand high memory or intensive disk I/O.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large is an entry-level x86_64 server instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 2.0 GB of RAM. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower percentiles, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1099.89 and a multi-core score of 1457.99. Memory bandwidth is constrained, measuring under 10 GB/sec for large blocks. This instance is qualitatively cost-effective for lightweight, dedicated compute tasks that do not require substantial memory or storage, such as basic static web serving, simple background workers, and low-demand utility applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large is an entry-level x86_64 server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 2.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for lightweight utility workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large features 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 2.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth for lightweight utility workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core entry-level instance with minimal memory footprint, designed for lightweight utility tasks and basic background processing.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz
2.0 GB of system memory with no bundled local storage
Dedicated CPU allocation avoiding shared-core resource contention
Best suited for lightweight static web serving and simple background tasks
